arts.sum: Sutton says Maeda is needed for Celtic to make Champions League But Sutton insists Celtic cannot allow Maeda to leave this summer amid Brendan Rodgers’ desire to sign him on a new contract .

arts.ttl: What we spotted from Celtic training before St Johnstone clash as starting spot clue dropped
arts.sum: Rodgers will likely welcome back injured stars who missed the 3-2 Rangers defeat two weeks ago and who sat on the sidelines against Hearts last weekend. It was a clean sheet and a win last weekend as Celtic beat Hearts 3-0 on Sinisalo’s first league start.

arts.ttl: TV presenter refuses to do interview after despicable attack on Celtic star Kasper Schmeichel
arts.sum: “I don’t want to talk to a newspaper that thinks it’s okay to write like that about another person. The international break was tough for Celtic’s player who was injured on Denmark duty and then slaughtered by a disrespectful journalist for his performance vs Portugal.
